description: Expose all CODEREF-CORE CLI tools via package.json bin entries. Add missing bin entries for semantic-integration and detect-languages. Audit all 12 CLI entry points for complete flag coverage, consistent --help output, and matching SKILL.md documentation.
resolution: Deep-dive discovery found no bin gaps. All 10 CLI commands are correctly exposed in package.json bin. detect-languages and semantic-integration are helper modules imported by other CLIs — they are not standalone commands and should not have bin entries. Only defect found: CLI.md command overview listed detect-languages as a command (line 37). Fixed by removing that row. WO-CLI-FULL-FEATURE-COVERAGE-001.
